'''âth-w-z''' ('''kathawaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulpitize|pulpitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulpitize|pulpitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathawaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithawaz|thithawaz]] || [[word:jithawaz|jithawaz]] || [[word:shithawaz|shithawaz]] || [[word:kithawaz|kithawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthawaz|thuthuthawaz]] || [[word:jujuthawaz|jujuthawaz]] || [[word:shushuthawaz|shushuthawaz]] || [[word:kukuthawaz|kukuthawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthawaz|thuthawaz]] || [[word:juthawaz|juthawaz]] || [[word:shuthawaz|shuthawaz]] || [[word:kuthawaz|kuthawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthawaz|thuthawaz]] || [[word:juthawaz|juthawaz]] || [[word:shuthawaz|shuthawaz]] || [[word:kuthawaz|kuthawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethawaz|thethawaz]] || [[word:jethawaz|jethawaz]] || [[word:shethawaz|shethawaz]] || [[word:kethawaz|kethawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothawaz|thothothawaz]] || [[word:jojothawaz|jojothawaz]] || [[word:shoshothawaz|shoshothawaz]] || [[word:kokothawaz|kokothawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothawaz|thothawaz]] || [[word:jothawaz|jothawaz]] || [[word:shothawaz|shothawaz]] || [[word:kothawaz|kothawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothawaz|thothawaz]] || [[word:jothawaz|jothawaz]] || [[word:shothawaz|shothawaz]] || [[word:kothawaz|kothawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthawaz|thĂŠthawaz]] || [[word:jĂŠthawaz|jĂŠthawaz]] || [[word:shĂŠthawaz|shĂŠthawaz]] || [[word:kĂŠthawaz|kĂŠthawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathawaz|thathathawaz]] || [[word:jajathawaz|jajathawaz]] || [[word:shashathawaz|shashathawaz]] || [[word:kakathawaz|kakathawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathawaz|thathawaz]] || [[word:jathawaz|jathawaz]] || [[word:shathawaz|shathawaz]] || [[word:kathawaz|kathawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathawaz|thathawaz]] || [[word:jathawaz|jathawaz]] || [[word:shathawaz|shathawaz]] || [[word:kathawaz|kathawaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathawaz|shathawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathawaz|goshathawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathawaz|gokishathawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathawaznĂŒ|shathawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathawaznknĂŒ|goshathawaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawaznĂŒ|gokishathawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathawazshĂ«|shathawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathawaznkshĂ«|goshathawaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathawazshĂ«|gokishathawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawazro|shathawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawaznkro|goshathawaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawazro|gokishathawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawazmu|shathawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawaznkmu|goshathawaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawazmu|gokishathawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathawazsher|shathawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathawaznksher|goshathawaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathawazsher|gokishathawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathawazng|shathawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathawaznkng|goshathawaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathawazng|gokishathawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathawazya|shathawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathawaznkya|goshathawaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathawazya|gokishathawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathawazyam|shathawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathawaznkyam|goshathawaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathawazyam|gokishathawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawaznĂŒshĂ«|shathawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshathawaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishathawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawaznĂŒro|shathawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawaznknĂŒro|goshathawaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawaznĂŒro|gokishathawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawaznĂŒmu|shathawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawaznknĂŒmu|goshathawaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawaznĂŒmu|gokishathawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawazshĂ«nĂŒ|shathawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawazshĂ«ro|shathawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawaznkshĂ«ro|goshathawaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawazshĂ«ro|gokishathawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawazshĂ«mu|shathawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawaznkshĂ«mu|goshathawaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawazshĂ«mu|gokishathawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawazronĂŒ|shathawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawaznkronĂŒ|goshathawaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawazronĂŒ|gokishathawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawazroshĂ«|shathawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawaznkroshĂ«|goshathawaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawazroshĂ«|gokishathawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawazromu|shathawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawaznkromu|goshathawaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawazromu|gokishathawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawazmunĂŒ|shathawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawaznkmunĂŒ|goshathawaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawazmunĂŒ|gokishathawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawazmushĂ«|shathawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawaznkmushĂ«|goshathawaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawazmushĂ«|gokishathawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawazmuro|shathawazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawaznkmuro|goshathawaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawazmuro|gokishathawazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|2edd495}}
